config.title: Dashboard
config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; } body { background: #111; color: #fff; margin: 0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .neo-layout { display: flex; min-height: 100vh; } .neo-sidebar { width: 250px; background: #1a1a1a; padding: 25px 20px; border-right: 1px solid #333; } .neo-brand { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 40px; color: #00ffcc; letter-spacing: 2px; } .neo-nav { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .neo-nav li { margin-bottom: 20px; } .neo-nav a { color: #888; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; font-size: 1.1rem; } .neo-nav a:hover { color: #fff; } .neo-main { flex: 1; padding: 40px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 30px; } .neo-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; padding-bottom: 20px; } .neo-header h2 { margin: 0; } #neo-time { color: #00ffcc; font-family: monospace; font-size: 1.2rem; } .neo-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 25px; } .neo-card { background: #1a1a1a; padding: 25px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #333; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .neo-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: #00ffcc; } .neo-card h3 { margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #888; font-size: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; } .neo-stat { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; color: #fff; }
config.js: function updateTime() { const now = new Date(); const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString(); const timeEl = document.getElementById('neo-time'); if(timeEl) timeEl.innerText = timeStr; } setInterval(updateTime, 1000); updateTime(); console.log('App 02: Neo Loaded');

config.title: Onyx
config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; } body { background: #fafafa; color: #222; margin: 0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .onyx-app { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .onyx-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 25px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #eee; margin-bottom: 40px; align-items: center; } .onyx-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 3px; } .onyx-cart { font-weight: bold; background: #222; color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.9rem; } .onyx-hero { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 60px; } .onyx-hero h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; margin: 0 0 15px 0; font-weight: 800; } .onyx-hero p { color: #666; font-size: 1.2rem; margin: 0; } .onyx-products { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 40px; margin-bottom: 60px; flex-grow: 1; } .onyx-product { text-align: center; background: #fff; padding: 25px; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); transition: transform 0.3s; } .onyx-product:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); } .img-placeholder { height: 250px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .onyx-product h4 { margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 1.2rem; } .onyx-product p { color: #888; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 20px 0; font-weight: bold; } button.add-btn { background: #222; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.1s; font-weight: bold; width: 100%; } button.add-btn:hover { background: #000; } button.add-btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .onyx-footer { text-align: center; padding: 30px 0; border-top: 1px solid #eee; color: #aaa; font-size: 0.9rem; }
config.js: let cartItemCount = 0; function addToCart() { cartItemCount++; const cartCounter = document.getElementById('cart-count'); if(cartCounter) { cartCounter.innerText = cartItemCount; cartCounter.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)'; setTimeout(() => cartCounter.style.transform = 'scale(1)', 200); } } console.log('App 03: Onyx Store Ready');
